playbook.intent: Every 90 days, decide whether to raise rates, with whom, and by how much. Done = rate decision matrix updated, raise-letters drafted for eligible clients, new prospect quotes adjusted.
playbook.scope: Every 90 days, decide whether to raise rates, with whom, and by how much. Done = rate decision matrix updated, raise-letters drafted for eligible clients, new prospect quotes adjusted.

success-criteria.criterion: Data pull stage complete: Utilization report
Decide raises stage complete: Rate decision matrix
Draft + send stage complete: Raise-letters sent

stage.name: Data pull
stage.intent: Gather utilization, pipeline, market rate, and client scorecard.

tasks.task: Pull billable utilization for the quarter
Survey market-rate signal for your niche

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with quantitative inputs, not vibes.

stage.name: Decide raises
stage.intent: Pick whom to raise, by how much, and when.

tasks.task: Score each client on raise-eligibility (relationship, contract length, growth)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each client has a decision (raise / hold / drop).

stage.name: Draft + send
stage.intent: Send raise-letters; quote new prospects at new rate.

tasks.task: Draft personalised raise-letter per eligible client
Update all proposal templates to new rate

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when letters are sent and templates updated.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content quarterly-rate-adjustment-review --format md, agent: faion get-content quarterly-rate-adjustment-review --format context, json: faion get-content quarterly-rate-adjustment-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
